inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Message
inputs.description: Text body of the Discord message or embed description.

inputs.name: title
inputs.label: Embed Title
inputs.description: Overrides the configured embed title at runtime.

inputs.name: webhook
inputs.label: Webhook URL Override
inputs.description: Overrides the configured webhook URL at runtime.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Pass-through
outputs.description: The message that was sent, passed unchanged for chaining.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if sending to Discord failed.
